description: Act as a newsletter editor curating technical mailing list discussions. Create a folder named 'Newsletter-Material' and move exactly 3 emails into it, ensuring the selection includes messages from at least 2 different mailing lists (e.g., SAdev, ILUG). Draft an email to 'subscribers@tech-weekly.com' with the subject 'Tech Weekly Digest - Issue 42' that lists the exact subject line and a one-sentence summary for each of the 3 selected emails.
